title: crataegus viridis var. viridis
intro: Crataegus viridis var. viridis, also known as the green hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn tree native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its dark green leaves and red berries. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a vasodilator, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Crataegus viridis var. viridis include reducing blood pressure, improving heart health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
